name: filter_incident
description: Set the map's incident-type filter so only one category of incident is shown. Pass type as one of: dwelling_fire, outdoor_fire, false_alarm, special_service, or all (to clear the filter and show everything). Map the operator's words onto these (e.g. 'house fires' -> dwelling_fire, 'rubbish/grass fires' -> outdoor_fire, 'false alarms' -> false_alarm, 'special service / rescues' -> special_service, 'show everything / clear filter' -> all). Call whenever the operator asks to filter, show only, or reset the incident type.

type.description: Incident category to show: dwelling_fire, outdoor_fire, false_alarm, special_service, or all.
